title: State Drug Alert: From Antibiotics to Antihypertensives, 134 Samples Found NSQ in February Audit
summary: New Delhi: Reflecting ongoing concerns over drug quality in India, the Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation (CDSCO) has flagged 134 drug samples as Not of Standard Quality (NSQ) in its February...
thbAction: Position THB's pharma CRM and omnichannel HCP engagement workflows to support launch planning, KAM orchestration, and compliant follow-up across India and the Middle East.
